title: standleya kuhlmannii
intro: Standleya kuhlmannii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Standleya kuhlmannii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, Standleya kuhlmannii is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
